messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Bastion

### Bastion

```hcl
resource "oci_bastion_bastion" "bastion" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  target_subnet_id = oci_core_subnet.bastion_subnet.id
  display_name = "my-bastion"

  bastion_type = "STANDARD"

  max_session_ttl_in_seconds = 1800
}
```

### Session

```hcl
resource "oci_bastion_session" "session" {
  bastion_id = oci_bastion_bastion.bastion.id
  display_name = "my-session"

  session_type = "MANAGE_SSH"

  target_resource_id = oci_core_instance.vm.id
  target_resource_port = "22"
  target_resource_user = "opc"

  ssh_public_key = file("~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub")
}
```

### Usage

```bash
oci bastion session connect --session-id $SESSION_ID
```

### SSH Tunnel

```bash
ssh -i key -L 5432:target:5432 -N bastion@host
```
